scripts.build: wp-scripts build src/blocks/vacancy-archive.js src/blocks/latest-vacancies.js src/blocks/single-vacancy.js src/blocks/vacancy-search.js src/blocks/application-form.js src/blocks/vacancy-images.js src/blocks/share-buttons.js src/blocks/related-vacancies.js src/blocks/registration-form.js --output-path=assets/js/blocks
scripts.start: wp-scripts start src/blocks/vacancy-archive.js src/blocks/latest-vacancies.js src/blocks/single-vacancy.js src/blocks/vacancy-search.js src/blocks/application-form.js src/blocks/vacancy-images.js src/blocks/share-buttons.js src/blocks/related-vacancies.js src/blocks/registration-form.js --output-path=assets/js/blocks
